tweets.text: .@JohnKerry: We commend Japan’s support for those who have been displaced by ISIL, the Syrian regime, and militants. http://t.co/KUzn8sLHLr
.@JohnKerry: The barbaric killing of Kenji Goto, and of Haruna Yukawa, shows ISIL's brutality and extremist agenda. http://t.co/KUzn8sLHLr
.@JohnKerry: U.S. condemns ISIL's vicious murder of Kenji Goto. We extend condolences to his wife, family, loved ones, and people of Japan.
.@NSCPress: U.S. strongly condemns ISIL's actions, calls for immediate release of all remaining hostages. We stand with our ally Japan.
.@NSCPress: We've seen video purporting to show Japan's Kenji Goto murdered by terrorist group ISIL. We're working to confirm authenticity.
